company.title: Name your company
company.description: This is the organization your agents will work for.

agent.title: Create your first agent
agent.description: Choose how this agent will run tasks.

task.title: Give it something to do
task.description: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.

launch.title: Ready to launch
launch.description: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

company-goal.label: Mission / goal (optional)
company-goal.placeholder: What is this company trying to achieve?

task-description.label: Description (optional)
task-description.placeholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...

env-check.title: Adapter environment check
env-check.description: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
env-check.auth-fail-hint: If auth fails, set <1>{{envVar}}</1> in env or run <3>{{loginCmd}}</3>.
env-check.claude-login-hint: If login is required, run <1>claude login</1> and retry.
env-check.anthropic-key-warning: Claude failed while <1>ANTHROPIC_API_KEY</1> is set. You can clear it in this CEO adapter config and retry the probe.

error.no-company-selected: Create or select a company before testing adapter environment.
error.opencode-model-required: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.
error.opencode-models-loading: OpenCode models are still loading. Please wait and try again.
error.opencode-no-models: No OpenCode models discovered. Run `opencode models` and authenticate providers.
error.anthropic-key-still-failing: Retried with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset in adapter config, but the environment test is still failing.
error.unset-anthropic-failed: Failed to unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and retry.
